name: npu-text-tools
title: NPU Text Tools
description: On-device text rewriting and cleanup using Phi-Silica via Windows Copilot Runtime.
author: user

commands.name: fix-grammar
commands.title: Fix Grammar
commands.description: Correct spelling and grammar without changing meaning.

commands.name: make-formal
commands.title: Make Formal
commands.description: Rewrite text in a professional tone.

commands.name: make-concise
commands.title: Make Concise
commands.description: Shorten text to its essential points.

commands.name: bullet-points
commands.title: Bullet Points
commands.description: Convert prose into a bullet point list.

commands.name: custom-rewrite
commands.title: Custom Rewrite
commands.description: Describe how you want the text rewritten.
